description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly grayish-blue coloration. The surface is uneven, featuring both broad, flat planes and jagged, fractured edges, with some areas appearing slightly darker due to shadowing or mineral variation. One side of the stone displays a pronounced overhang, creating a shallow, cave-like recess, while the opposite side is more solid and blocky. The texture is coarse and granular, with visible pitting and natural weathering marks, suggesting exposure to the elements. There are no visible carvings or artificial modifications, and the stone appears to be a solid mass with no significant internal cavities. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban park, roadside, or landscaped area.
description: A large, rugged gray-blue stone with jagged edges, coarse texture, and a shallow overhang on one side. Its weathered, natural appearance makes it a prominent urban obstacle or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the broad, flat face of the stone with subtle layering and a slightly sloped top surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the jagged, fractured edge and the transition from the flat face to a more angular, shadowed side.
description_view_2: This view reveals the pronounced overhang and shallow recess beneath, emphasizing the stone's irregular, cave-like underside.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the blocky, solid rear of the stone, with visible layering and a rough, angular profile.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, landscaped plaza
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural layering and mottling with no regular or artificial patterns; surface pitting and mineral variation are visible.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible pitting and minor erosion, indicating prolonged exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured urban surfaces but can blend with natural landscaping or other stones; may be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
